name: السيف القادم
overview: نشأ تشن بينغ آن في بلدة صغيرة هادئة وعاش حياة متواضعة وسلمية ولكن عندما وصل غرباء غامضون تداعى عالمه العادي مما كشف له عن واقع لم تعد فيه المزارعون الخالدون والتنانين الأسطورية والقوى الاستثنائية مجرد قصص بدأت أحداث غريبة تتوالى في بلدته مما سحبه إلى قدر عظيم لا يمكن التنبؤ به ولم يتخيله قط
title: السيف القادم
overview_en: Chen Ping an grew up in a small quiet town living a humble and peaceful life But when mysterious outsiders arrived his ordinary world unraveled exposing him to a reality where immortal cultivators mythical dragons and extraordinary powers were no longer just stories Strange occurrences began to ripple through his town pulling him into a grand unpredictable destiny he never imagined

name: 择天记
title: 择天记
overview_en: At the beginning of time a mystical meteor came crashing down from outer space and scattered all over the world A piece of it landed in the Eastern Continent There were mysterious totems carved upon the meteor and people gathered around it wanting to discover its usage They discovered the Way and established The Tradition Several thousand years later the fourteen years old orphan Chen Chang Shang left his master to cure his illness and change his fate He brought a piece of marriage vow with him to the capital thus began the journey of a rising hero

name: かぐや様は告らせたい～大人への階段～
original_name: かぐや様は告らせたい～大人への階段～
title: かぐや様は告らせたい 大人への階段
title_en: かぐや様は告らせたい 大人への階段

name: Tシャツが乾くまで
title: Tシャツが乾くまで
overview_en: A sudden summer accident shatters the peaceful lives of two couples dragging a happily married editor into a web of grief human selfishness and her husband s hidden secrets

name: Quem Ama Cuida
title: Quem Ama Cuida
overview_en: A hardworking physical therapist Adriana is facing multiple challenges at once After being fired from the clinic where she works her house is hit by a flood that ends up killing her husband Carlos Now homeless and struggling to support her family Adriana starts working for the Brandãos a traditional wealthy family from São Paulo as the caregiver for Artur the grumpy patriarch The millionaire jeweler known for driving away every employee gradually forms a genuine bond with Adriana who must also deal with the distrust of the rest of the family

name: Surviving Earth
title: Surviving Earth
overview_en: Meet the bizarre amazing and breathtaking creatures and landscapes of a vibrant lost world and discover how life not only survived during the cataclysmic events of this prehistoric era but thrived

name: 晩酌の流儀
title: 晩酌の流儀
overview_en: Evening Drink Style Banshaku no Ryugi is a popular Japanese drama about Miyuki Izawa s ritual of crafting the perfect meal to pair with her end of day drink often beer emphasizing simple pleasures moderation home cooking and work life balance a concept resonating with viewers seeking relaxing relatable content with culinary inspiration It s known for its calming vibe focus on delicious food pairings like lamb with soy ginger sauce and promoting a healthy approach to enjoying alcohol

name: الموتى السائرون: داريل ديكسن
overview: يصل داريل إلى الشاطئ في فرنسا ويكافح من أجل فهم كيفية وصوله إلى هناك ولماذا يتتبع المسلسل رحلته عبر فرنسا المكسورة ولكن المرنة حيث يأمل في العثور على طريق العودة إلى الوطن أثناء قيامه بالرحلة فإن الروابط التي يشكلها على طول الطريق تزيد من تعقيد خطته النهائية
title: الموتى السائرون داريل ديكسن
overview_en: After washing ashore in France Daryl struggles to piece together how he got there and why as he navigates a fractured walker infested landscape to find his way home During his journey Daryl has to protect a young boy Laurent who is seen as a messiah while facing new dangerous walker variants and the Power of the Living paramilitary group as the connections he forms along the way complicate his plan to return home

title: My Grandfather Charles Manson

data.overview: Sophia was always the good girl growing up and her father's rock, but her quest to identify her unknown grandfather results in a shocking discovery: He is Charles Manson, history's most notorious criminal; and he bears striking physical similarities to her beloved father. Sophia's discovery propels her into an underworld of Manson family members and unreliable narrators as she traces her grandfather's life. Along the way, her genetics unlock never-before-released records and audio recordings that illuminate Manson's pathology in startling ways. But the more Sophia uncovers, the more her relationship with her father is strained. For Sophia, there's no turning back. What has she inherited, and how will she reckon with her family legacy?
data.tagline: Discover a new side to his dark side.

overview_en: Sophia was always the good girl growing up and her father s rock but her quest to identify her unknown grandfather results in a shocking discovery He is Charles Manson history s most notorious criminal and he bears striking physical similarities to her beloved father Sophia s discovery propels her into an underworld of Manson family members and unreliable narrators as she traces her grandfather s life Along the way her genetics unlock never before released records and audio recordings that illuminate Manson s pathology in startling ways But the more Sophia uncovers the more her relationship with her father is strained For Sophia there s no turning back What has she inherited and how will she reckon with her family legacy

name: سبارتاكوس: بيت آشور
overview: في عالمٍ نجا فيه من أحداث سبارتاكوس 2010 شقّ آشور طريقه بصعوبةٍ إلى السلطة ممتلكًا نفس مدرسة الفنون القتالية التي كانت تملكه سابقًا وبتحالفه مع مصارعةٍ شرسة أشعل آشور نوعًا جديدًا من الاستعراضات التي أغضبت النخبة
title: سبارتاكوس بيت آشور
overview_en: In a world where he survived the events of Spartacus Ashur clawed his way to power owning the same ludus that once owned him Allying with a fierce gladiatrix Ashur ignites a new kind of spectacle that offends the elite

title: The Strangers Chapter 3

data.overview: Tethered by a frightening conclusion, Maya and the Strangers are locked on an unavoidable, unforgiving collision course — a showdown that proves they’re far from strangers now.
Maya affronte une dernière fois les tueurs masqués dans un règlement  de comptes brutal et complet,une histoire de survie et de vengeance.
data.title: Les inconnus : Chapitre 3

data.overview: Maya affronte une dernière fois les tueurs masqués dans un règlement de comptes brutal et complet, une histoire de survie et de vengeance.
data.title: Les Intrus : Chapitre 3

data.overview: Bị trói chặt bởi một kết cục đáng sợ, Maya và những kẻ xa lạ bị cuốn vào quỹ đạo va chạm không thể tránh khỏi — tàn nhẫn và không khoan nhượng. Cuộc đối đầu cuối cùng ấy phơi bày một sự thật rõ ràng: họ đã không còn là những người xa lạ từ lâu.
data.title: Sát Nhân Giấu Mặt: Chương 3

data.overview: Maya enfrenta os assassinos mascarados uma última vez em um acerto de contas brutal e cíclico de sobrevivência e vingança.
data.title: Os Estranhos: Capítulo Final

data.overview: 핀업걸이 죽은 후, 남은 두 살인마들의 끝없는 추격으로 다시 한번 그들의 손아귀에 붙잡힌 마야. 스케어크로우와 돌페이스는 마야에게 핀업걸의 가면을 씌우고 그들의 살인 게임에 강제로 동참시킨다. 한편, 마야를 찾는 가족과 친구들이 비너스 마을까지 다다르고 마스크 살인마들과 마을을 둘러싼 어두운 비밀이 차츰 밝혀진다. 수십 년을 이어 온 살육과 비극의 숨바꼭질을 끝내기 위해, 마야는 이제 스스로 총을 들고 마지막 게임을 준비하는데...
data.title: 스트레인저스: 챕터3

data.overview: 在該系列最殘酷的章節中，瑪雅與蒙面殺手發生衝突，並發現擺脫噩夢的唯一方法……就是進入噩夢之中。
data.title: 絕殺路人甲

data.overview: 在系列终章中，幸存者们将面对蒙面陌生人的新威胁。随着秘密浮出水面，现实与危险的界限逐渐模糊，他们的生存之战也愈发凶险。
data.title: 陌生人：第三章

data.overview: Los supervivientes se enfrentan a nuevas amenazas de extraños enmascarados. Secretos salen a la luz, poniendo en peligro sus vidas mientras la línea entre realidad y peligro se difumina en su lucha por sobrevivir. Tercera y última de la trilogía de películas basadas en "Los extraños" (2008)
data.title: Strangers: Capítulo 3

data.overview: הפרק האחרון והאכזרי ביותר בסדרת הסרטים.  מאיה מתעמתת עם הרוצחים במסכות, ומגלה שהדרך היחידה לצאת מהסיוט.. היא להיכנס אליו.
data.title: הזרים: חלק 3

data.overview: No último capítulo de Os Estranhos, os sobreviventes enfrentam novas ameaças dos estranhos mascarados. Segredos vêm à tona, colocando as suas vidas em risco, enquanto a linha entre a realidade e o perigo se torna cada vez mais ténue na luta pela sobrevivência.
data.title: Os Estranhos - Capítulo 3

data.overview: Nakon što je preživjela njihov prethodni napad, Maya sada se mora suočiti s maskiranim ubojicama u obračunu koji donosi zastrašujući, nezaustavljiv krug osvete. Stranci se vraćaju da dovrše ono što su započeli – bez milosti, bez oklijevanja, vođeni bolesnom željom da unište sve pred sobom. Sama, iscrpljena i zarobljena u najgoroj noćnoj mori, Maya ulazi u svoju posljednju borbu za život, dok joj se u tamu ponovno vraćaju lica koja nikada neće zaboraviti.
data.title: Stranci: Treće Poglavlje

data.overview: ภายหลังจากถูกฆาตกรสวมหน้ากาก “Pin-Up Girl”, “Scarecrow”, และ “Dollface” ไล่ฆ่าทั่วเมืองอย่างไร้เหตุผล มันบอกแค่ว่าเป็นเพียงเพราะ “เธอ” ดันมาอยู่ที่นี่ “มายา” สูญเสียคู่หมั้นด้วยเงื้อมมือพวกมันไปต่อหน้าต่อตา ด้วยใจที่แตกสลายและความแค้นถึงขีดสุด เธอฆ่าหนึ่งในฆาตกรหน้ากากได้สำเร็จ แต่ฝันร้ายกลับยังไม่จบ เพราะเธอหาทางออกจากเมืองนี้ไปไม่ได้ มายาหนีตายเพียงลำพังในเมืองที่เต็มไปด้วยคนแปลกหน้าและความประหลาดสุดสยอง และในครั้งนี้เมื่อมองไม่เห็นหนทางหนี โอกาสสุดท้ายที่จะรอดคือเธอต้องสวมหน้ากาก จับขวาน และเข้าร่วมทีมกับพวกมัน มายาจะเลือกล้างแค้นโดยฆ่าฆาตกรหน้ากากที่เหลือ หรือจะกลายเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของความอำมหิตแล้วออกล่าผู้คนในเมืองอย่างไร้เหตุผลแบบที่พวกมันเคยทำกับเธอ!
data.title: เดอะ สเตรนเจอร์ส กระชากหน้าอำมหิต

data.overview: Maya znosiła traumę, by później zmagać się z jej następstwami. Zamaskowani zabójcy wprowadzili do jej życia niewyobrażalny chaos, lecz teraz role się odwracają. Dziewczyna po raz ostatni staje twarzą w twarz z nieznajomymi w brutalnej rozgrywce. Ucieczka nie wchodzi w grę.
data.title: The Strangers: Chapter 3

data.overview: Небольшой город Винус в штате Орегон. Майя вновь сталкивается с Незнакомцами и становится целью похищения. Пока группа пытается обучить Майю и сделать частью Незнакомцев, её муж Говард и сестра Дебби приезжают из Портленда, чтобы разыскать девушку.
data.title: Незнакомцы: Часть третья

data.overview: Η Μάγια είναι η μοναδική που επέζησε. Έχοντας χάσει τον σύντροφό της και κάθε αίσθηση ασφάλειας, δεν αναζητά πια απαντήσεις, ούτε δικαίωση. Η βία που βίωσε δεν ζητά εξήγηση - έχει ήδη αφήσει το αποτύπωμά της. Καθώς επιστρέφει στο επίκεντρο του εφιάλτη, η Μάγια μοιάζει να κινείται μηχανικά και να κινδυνεύει να γίνει κι εκείνη, μέρος του.
data.title: Κλείδωσες; Οι Άγνωστοι 3

data.overview: Maya se enfrenta a los asesinos enmascarados y descubre que la única salida de la pesadilla es hacia adentro.
data.title: Los Extraños: Capítulo 3

data.overview: A Hívatlanok trilógia fináléjában Maya (Madelaine Petsch) utoljára néz szembe a maszkos gyilkosokkal, akik kegyetlen módon megölték a szerelmét, és rá is kitartóan vadásznak. A brutális, végső leszámolásban nemcsak a túlélés a cél, a bosszú is hajtja a hősnőt, hogy elégtételt vegyen a szeretett férfiért és visszakapja az élete feletti irányítást.
data.title: Hívatlanok - Utolsó fejezet

data.overview: În ultimul film al trilogiei "Necunoscuții", Maya se confruntă cu noi amenințări din partea necunoscuților mascați. Secretele ies la iveală, punându-i vieța în pericol, pe măsură ce granița dintre realitate și pericol se estompează în lupta ei pentru viață.
data.title: Necunoscuții: Capitolul final

data.overview: Bundet af en skræmmende afslutning er Maya og de fremmede låst fast på en uundgåelig og nådesløs kollisionskurs – et opgør, der beviser, at de langt fra er fremmede nu.
Maya se še zadnjič sooči z zamaskiranimi napadalci v brutalnem in usodnem obračunu. Film raziskuje ozadje napadalcev in prinaša odgovore, ki so se stopnjevali skozi prva dve poglavji.
data.title: Tujci: Tretje poglavje

data.overview: Svázáni děsivým závěrem, Maya a Cizinci jsou uvězněni na nevyhnutelném, nemilosrdném kolizním kurzu – v rozhodujícím střetu, který dokazuje, že už zdaleka nejsou cizinci.

De gemaskerde moordenaars lieten een spoor van dood en verderf na waarbij de overlevende en getraumatiseerde slachtoffers de draad van het leven pogen op te nemen. Zo ook Maya, die wraak zweert en voor eens en altijd met de daders wil afrekenen. Intussen worden verontrustende geheimen blootgelegd.
在該系列最殘酷的章節中，瑪雅與蒙面殺手發生衝突，並發現擺脫噩夢的唯一方法……就是進入噩夢之中。
data.title: 嗜殺路人丙

data.overview: Susieti bauginančios pabaigos, Maja ir nepažįstamieji atsiduria neišvengiamame, negailestingame susidūrimo kelyje - akistatoje, kuri įrodo, kad jie jau toli gražu nebe svetimi.
data.title: Nepažįstamieji: Trečia dalis

data.overview: Vor einer Weile wurden Maya und ihr Freund Ryan im abgelegenen amerikanischen Hinterland von maskierten Fremden brutal in ihren eigenen vier Wänden attackiert. Nur mit Glück kam die junge Frau mit dem Leben davon. Doch damit nicht genug. Denn schon bald darauf tauchten die Killer auch in der Klinik auf, in die sie eingeliefert worden war. Nach einer nervenaufreibenden und äußerst schmerzhaften Hetzjagd durch die engen Korridore des Krankenhauses konnte sie auch dieses Mal das Ganze gerade noch überstehen. Im Anschluss an diese Tortur ist Maya an einem Punkt angelangt, an dem sie sich den maskierten Psychopathen entschlossen entgegenstellen will – um die Sache zu beenden, aber auch, um Rache für all das Leid zu nehmen, das die Unbekannten ihr scheinbar ohne irgendein Motiv zugefügt haben.
Maya och en främling är på en oundviklig, oförlåtande kollisionskurs – en uppgörelse som bevisar att de är långt ifrån främlingar för varandra.

overview_en: Tethered by a frightening conclusion Maya and the Strangers are locked on an unavoidable unforgiving collision course a showdown that proves they re far from strangers now
